title: Garlicky Gooey Canadian White Asparagus Gratin
description: A festive Canadian dish featuring white asparagus, soffritto-base, and a garlicky cheese-pull, this gratin is perfect for a special occasion, and its tamasic-friendly ingredients make it suitable for an ayurvedic diet.
instructions: In a large skillet, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, carrots, and celery, and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked soffritto mixture, white asparagus, gruyere cheese, parmesan cheese, bread crumbs, salt, and black pepper.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional cheese and bread crumbs if desired.
Bake the gratin in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the gratin from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve the garlicky gooey Canadian white asparagus gratin hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
